svg.text: 100K PDFs · SharePoint Online → Blob (PDF + Metadata JSON) → Doc Intelligence → Snowflake · Cert-free Managed Identity auth
Fan-Out: Max 5 Concurrent Activities · Batches of 200 files
• vs current: 10 threads × CSOM = higher cost
• Delta query: incremental after first run
• No Key Vault, no client secret, no PEM on disk
• Full SP metadata in sidecar JSON
